reason: Minor prose imprecision at line 1503 of the LaTeX: 'one for each entry of the d_A x d_A Hermitian matrix I_{d_A}' is slightly misleading. A d_A x d_A Hermitian matrix has d_A^2 complex entries but only d_A^2 real degrees of freedom (d_A diagonal reals + d_A(d_A-1)/2 complex off-diagonal entries giving d_A(d_A-1) additional reals). The count d_A^2 happens to be correct but the phrase 'one for each entry' conflates complex entries with real constraints. Consider: 'd_A^2 real constraints (the real dimension of Herm_{d_A})'.
